flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 5 pp at Orange Technical College-East Campus vs the 2003–2007 baseline (67.8% vs 72.9%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Orange Technical College-East Campus rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 (13.6% → 17.0%).
